examples: But you will not mind the roughness nor the steepness of the way.
Because people tend to overestimate the steepness of slopes, and not because we're lazy.
The steepness and ruggedness dismay us, and so we stay in the misty valleys and do not learn the mystery of the hills.
He was sweating heavily and his thigh muscles were twitchy from the steepness of the climb.
But it is unclear how the ramp or its steepness will change the outcome.
